comment.body:
I’ve been saying since February that the bottom confirmation will only come with a cease‑fire and the start of sustainable US QE, likely around June.
Right now, investors are pulling money out of US equities; upcoming earnings (TSLA, GOOG this week) will be weak, and the retail “buy‑the‑dip” crowd will lose its support.
